entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural production harvested per unit of land area

entities.name: POPULATION
entities.description: The global human population requiring food sustenance

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that impact crop production

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A method of crop improvement that uses genomic information to select for desired traits

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: PHENOTYPE
entities.description: The set of observable characteristics of an individual resulting from the interaction of its genotype with the environment

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic makeup of an individual organism

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of rapidly determining the genetic markers of many individuals

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The use of automated tools to rapidly measure plant traits on a large scale

entities.name: DATA ANALYTICAL CAPACITIES
entities.description: The computational ability to process and interpret large-scale biological data

entities.name: HIGH-TECH SENSORS
entities.description: Advanced sensing devices used to capture plant data

entities.name: ADVANCED ROBOTICS
entities.description: Robotic systems used for the automated movement and monitoring of plants

entities.name: IMAGE-PROCESSING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Computational systems used to analyze visual data from plants

entities.name: BREEDING NURSERIES
entities.description: Specialized locations where breeding plants are cultivated and monitored

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Agricultural trials conducted in natural field conditions

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS PLATFORMS
entities.description: Software and hardware systems designed for the analysis of biological data

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DATASETS
entities.description: Large collections of measured phenotypic traits

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL RESPONSES
entities.description: The way plants react to various environmental stressors or conditions

entities.name: GENE FUNCTIONS
entities.description: The biological roles and effects of specific genes within an organism
